lessons.title: Welcome to LangChain Fundamentals
lessons.description: A brief introduction to the course, explaining what LangChain is, its importance in building applications with large language models, and what learners will achieve by the end of this short tutorial.

lessons.title: What is LangChain
lessons.description: Understand the basics of LangChain, a framework for developing applications powered by language models, and explore its core purpose and use cases in real-world scenarios.

lessons.title: Setting Up Your LangChain Environment
lessons.description: Guide learners through installing LangChain and setting up a basic Python environment to start building applications, ensuring they have the necessary tools ready.

lessons.title: Understanding LangChain Components
lessons.description: Learn about key LangChain components like chains, agents, and memory, and how they work together to create powerful language model applications.

lessons.title: Creating Your First Chain
lessons.description: Build a simple LangChain chain to process input and generate output using a language model, practicing the fundamental concept of chaining prompts.

lessons.title: Working with Prompts in LangChain
lessons.description: Experiment with crafting and customizing prompts in LangChain to influence the output of language models, focusing on practical prompt engineering techniques.

lessons.title: Integrating an API with LangChain
lessons.description: Connect LangChain to an external API, such as OpenAI, to fetch data or enhance responses, applying real-world integration skills in a simple project.

lessons.title: Building a Basic Chatbot
lessons.description: Use LangChain to create a basic conversational chatbot, combining chains and memory to maintain context across multiple user inputs.

lessons.title: Debugging and Improving Your Application
lessons.description: Practice debugging a LangChain application by identifying common issues and optimizing performance through parameter adjustments and error handling.

lessons.title: Test Your LangChain Knowledge
lessons.description: Validate understanding of LangChain concepts and coding practices through a short set of questions covering the key topics from this course.

courseInfo.description: Dive into the basics of LangChain with this beginner-friendly course designed to get you started in just 15 minutes. LangChain is a powerful framework for building applications powered by large language models (LLMs). In this tutorial, you’ll learn the core concepts of LangChain, including chains, prompts, and integrations with APIs. Through hands-on coding exercises, you’ll set up your environment, create your first LangChain application, and build a simple chatbot. This course emphasizes practical skills, ensuring you spend most of your time writing code and applying concepts. By the end, you’ll have a solid foundation to explore more complex LangChain projects and understand how to leverage LLMs in real-world scenarios. Perfect for anyone new to AI application development!
courseInfo.title: Fundamentals of LangChain.js
